zh.lifeSummary: 當Hulda Herrick於大約1766年出生在美國紐約州時，她的父親John Herrick38歲，母親Huldah Morris26歲。她和Jonathan Sisson至少有3個兒子和8個女兒。她去世於大約1834年4月13日在加拿大新布隆士威省約克道格拉斯享年69歲，埋葬在加拿大新布隆士威省約克道格拉斯波次 可納 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Herrick
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Old Norse personal name Eiríkr, Old Danish, Old Swedish Erik, itself from Proto-Scandinavian ain- ‘one, select’ + rík- ‘rule(r)’ + prosthetic H-.

Irish (Cork): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hEirc ‘descendant of Erc’, a personal name meaning ‘speckled, dark red’ or ‘salmon’, and borne by a Christian saint. In Munster and Ulster this name has been changed to Harkin .

History: The English poet Robert Herrick (1591–1674) was the son of a wealthy London goldsmith, whose family had a long history in the town of Leicester. DNA analysis suggests that the modern surname is monogenetic, i.e. from a single eponymous bearer. The earliest known bearer of the name in Leicester was John Eirich, recorded as a burgess there in 1211. Leicester was one of the headquarters of the Viking army that conquered and settled the eastern midlands in the late 9th century, leading to the English adoption of many Old Norse personal names, such as Eirikr, as personal names. The initial aspirate is first recorded in the name of Nicholas Heyryke, recorded as a Leicester burgess in 1524.

variants.name: Harkin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Cormac, Jarlath, Paddy.

Irish (Donegal) and Scottish (Lanarkshire and Midlothian): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hEarcáin ‘descendant of Earcán’, a byname or personal name formed from a diminutive of earc ‘red, bloody’; also meaning ‘piglet’.

English: from the Middle English personal name Hardekin, Harkin, a borrowing into late Old English of Middle Dutch Hardekin. It is a pet form of ancient Germanic Hardo (see Hard 4) + the Middle Dutch hypocoristic suffix -kin. The name of a (presumably continental) moneyer at Stamford is stamped HÆRƉCYN, HARƉCIN, and HARCIN on coins of the reign of Edward the Confessor.

nameMeanings.name: Hulda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name (meaning ‘weasel’ in Hebrew), borne by a prophetess who foretold to Josiah the destruction of Jerusalem (2 Kings 22).

variants.name: Huldah
meanings: Biblical name (meaning ‘weasel’ in Hebrew), borne by a prophetess who foretold to Josiah the destruction of Jerusalem (2 Kings 22).

historicEvents.description: Thomas Jefferson's American Declaration of Independence endorsed by Congress. Colonies declare independence.

historicEvents.title: Shays' Rebellion
historicEvents.description: Caused by war veteran Daniel Shays, Shays' Rebellion was to protest economic and civil rights injustices that he and other farmers were seeing after the Revolutionary War. Because of the Rebellion it opened the eyes of the governing officials that the Articles of Confederation needed a reform. The Rebellion served as a guardrail when helping reform the United States Constitution.

historicEvents.title: Albany is Named Capital of New York
historicEvents.description: Albany became the capital of New York in 1797. Albany is the oldest continuous settlement of the original 13 colonies.
France sells Louisiana territories to U.S.A.
Oldest Grave seen in Memorials list

historicEvents.title: Panic! of 1819
historicEvents.description: With the Aftermath of the Napoleonic Wars the global market for trade was down. During this time, America had its first financial crisis and it lasted for only two years.

historicEvents.title: Slavery Becomes Illegal in New York State
historicEvents.description: During the years 1799 to 1827, New York went through a period of gradual emancipation. A Gradual Emancipation Law was passed in 1799 which freed slave children born after July 4, 1799. However, they were indentured until 25 years old for women and 28 years old for men. A law passed 1817 which freed slaves born before 1799, yet delayed their emancipation for ten years. All remaining slaves were freed in New York State on July 4, 1827.

en.lifeSummary: When Hulda Herrick was born about 1766, in New York, United States, her father, John Herrick, was 38 and her mother, Huldah Morris, was 26. She had at least 3 sons and 8 daughters with Jonathan Sisson. She died about 13 April 1834, in Douglas, York, New Brunswick, Canada, at the age of 69, and was buried in Burtts Corner Cemetery, Douglas, York, New Brunswick, Canada.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hulda Herrick est née environ 1766, à New York, États-Unis, son père, John Herrick, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Huldah Morris, avait 26 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 8 filles avec Jonathan Sisson. Elle est décédée environ 13 avril 1834, à Douglas, York, Nouveau-Brunswick, Canada, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterrée à Burtts Corner Cemetery, Douglas, York, Nouveau-Brunswick, Canada.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hulda Herrick um 1766 in New York, Vereinigte Staaten geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Herrick 38 und ihre Mutter Huldah Morris 26. Sie hatte mit Jonathan Sisson mindestens 3 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Sie starb um 13. April 1834 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Douglas, York, New Brunswick, Kanada und wurde in Burtts Corner Cemetery, Douglas, York, New Brunswick, Kanada begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hulda Herrick è nata il circa 1766 nel New York, Stati Uniti d'America, sua padre, John Herrick, aveva 38 anni e sua madre, Huldah Morris, aveva 26 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 8 figlie con Jonathan Sisson. Morì circa 13 aprile 1834, nel Douglas, York, Nuovo Brunswick, Canada, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolta a Burtts Corner Cemetery, Douglas, York, Nuovo Brunswick, Canada.

ko.lifeSummary: Hulda Herrick(이)가 대략 1766년 미국 뉴욕 주에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Herrick(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Huldah Morris(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 Jonathan Sisson(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1834년 4월 13일 캐나다 뉴브런즈윅 요르크 더글라스에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 캐나다 뉴브런즈윅 요르크 더글라스 버츠 코른어 세멧리에 묻혔다.

Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 8 filhas com Jonathan Sisson. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 13 de abril de 1834, em Douglas, York, Novo Brunswick, Canadá, com 69 anos, e foi sepultada em Burtts Corner Cemetery, Douglas, York, Novo Brunswick, Canadá.

ru.Burtts Corner Cemetery, Douglas, York, N: буртц корнир кеметири, доуглас, ерк, Нью-Брансуик, Канада
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hulda Herrick родилась около 1766 г. в местности Нью-Йорк, Соединенные штаты, её отцу по имени John Herrick было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Huldah Morris, 26. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 8 дочерей от Jonathan Sisson. Она умерла около 13 апреля 1834 г. в местности доуглас, ерк, Нью-Брансуик, Канада в возрасте 69 лет и была похоронена в местности буртц корнир кеметири, доуглас, ерк, Нью-Брансуик, Канада.
